body.title: Move domains/ out of devices/inference/ — a domain is not part of the proxy device
body.description:
Once the cycle is broken and the loop has moved, unseen_university/devices/inference/ imports nothing from domains/, so relocating the domain package is a pure directory move plus import rewrites. A domain (coding, prose, ...) is a task-kind owner consumed by workers (DickSimnel, aider, Igor) — it is not part of the inference proxy device, and living under devices/inference/ keeps implying it is.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/domains/* -> a home outside the inference device; all importers

**Scope boundary:** pure relocation; gated on T-inference-break-proxy-domain-cycle + T-inference-move-agentic-loop-to-domain. Confirm the destination with Akien before moving (single import root rule: everything ships under unseen_university/).

**Completion criteria:** no domain module lives under devices/inference/.

**Test plan:** import-graph assertion + full inference/dicksimnel suites green after the move.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: SUPERSEDED by D-domains-general-with-device-owned-specializations-2026-07-08. The destination question this ticket existed to ask is now answered: global domains -> unseen_university/domains/ (T-domains-global-package); shared execution primitives -> unseen_university/agentic/ (T-agentic-primitives-package, confirmed by Akien); specializations -> their own devices (T-ds-coding-domain-specialization, T-aider-coding-domain-specialization). devices/inference/domains/ was a waypoint from T-inference-move-agentic-loop-to-domain, not a destination.
body.unproven_reason: No code change to prove: this ticket is a pure scoping/retarget artifact, superseded before any move happened. The proof-lever we lack is a way to prove a RETARGET — proof_emitter has no red form for 'this ticket's question was answered elsewhere and its work redistributed to 4 successor tickets'. The real proofs land on the successors (each is a red->green relocation/structure proof).
